allow: Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx expo install expo-secure-store)
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx expo export --platform web 2>&1)
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && npx expo export --platform web 2>&1)
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && git add services/auth.ts store/auth-context.tsx app/_layout.tsx constants/api.ts services/api-client.ts docs/implementation-plan.md package.json package-lock.json app.json)
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && git checkout master && git pull origin master)
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && git fetch origin && git pull origin master)

Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx expo customize tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -5; npx expo export --dump-sourcemap --platform web 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls -la .expo/types/ 2>/dev/null)
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo "✓ tsc clean")
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx expo lint 2>&1 | grep -E "\(error|warning|✖\)")
Bash(cd "/mnt/g/Repos Personal/Civiti-Mobile" && npx expo lint 2>&1 | tail -20)
